proof:
import Mathlib
set_option pp.numericTypes true
set_option pp.funBinderTypes true
set_option maxHeartbeats 0
open BigOperators Real Nat Topology Rat

theorem putnam_2025_b3 :
    ∀ S : Set ℕ,
      S.Nonempty →
      (∀ n ∈ S, 0 < n) →
      (∀ n ∈ S, ∀ d : ℕ, 0 < d → d ∣ (2025 ^ n - 15 ^ n) → d ∈ S) →
      S = {n : ℕ | 0 < n} := by
  intro S hne hpos hdiv
  ext n
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  constructor
  .
    exact hpos n
  .
    intro hn
    obtain ⟨n₀, hn₀⟩ := hne
    have h1 : 1 ∈ S := hdiv n₀ hn₀ 1 one_pos (one_dvd _)
    suffices ∀ m, 0 < m → m ∈ S by exact this n hn
    intro m
    induction m using Nat.strong_induction_on with
    | _ m ih =>
      intro hm
      match m with
      | 0 => omega
      | 1 => exact h1
      | m' + 2 =>
        have hm_pos : 0 < m' + 2 := by omega
        have hm_gt1 : 1 < m' + 2 := by omega
        have hkey : ∃ L, 0 < L ∧ L < m' + 2 ∧ (m' + 2) ∣ 2025^L - 15^L := by
          use Nat.totient (m' + 2)
          have htot_pos : 0 < Nat.totient (m' + 2) := Nat.totient_pos.mpr hm_pos
          have htot_lt : Nat.totient (m' + 2) < m' + 2 := Nat.totient_lt (m' + 2) hm_gt1
          refine ⟨htot_pos, htot_lt, ?_⟩
          have hpow_le : 15 ^ Nat.totient (m' + 2) ≤ 2025 ^ Nat.totient (m' + 2) := by
            apply Nat.pow_le_pow_left; omega
          have hmod_eq : (2025 : ZMod (m' + 2)) ^ Nat.totient (m' + 2) =
                         (15 : ZMod (m' + 2)) ^ Nat.totient (m' + 2) := by sorry
          have hdvd : (m' + 2) ∣ 2025 ^ Nat.totient (m' + 2) - 15 ^ Nat.totient (m' + 2) := by sorry
          exact hdvd
        obtain ⟨L, hL_pos, hL_lt, hL_dvd⟩ := hkey
        have hL_in_S : L ∈ S := ih L hL_lt hL_pos
        exact hdiv L hL_in_S (m' + 2) hm_pos hL_dvd
name: putnam_2025_b3

  (hcop135 : ¬Coprime 135 n) (hdiv : 3 ∣ n ∨ 5 ∣ n) (hncop15 : ¬Coprime 15 n) :

lemma sub_goal (n g : ℕ) (hn_pos : 0 < n) (hn_ne : NeZero n)
  (h135_ge_1 : 1 ≤ 135 ^ n.totient) (hg_dvd_n : g ∣ n)
  (hcop_ndg_135 : (n / g).Coprime 135) :
  n / g ∣ 135 ^ n.totient - 1 := by
  set m := n / g with hm_def
  by_cases hm_eq_one : m = 1
  .
    simp [hm_eq_one]
  .
    have hg_pos : 0 < g := Nat.pos_of_dvd_of_pos hg_dvd_n hn_pos
    have hn_ge_g : g ≤ n := Nat.le_of_dvd hn_pos hg_dvd_n
    have hm_pos : 0 < m := Nat.div_pos hn_ge_g hg_pos
    have hm_gt_one : 1 < m := by
      have hm_ge_one : 1 ≤ m := Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr (Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm_pos)
      exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne hm_ge_one (Ne.symm hm_eq_one)
    have hcop : Nat.Coprime 135 m := Nat.Coprime.symm hcop_ndg_135
    have euler : (135 ^ m.totient) % m = 1 := Nat.pow_totient_mod_eq_one hm_gt_one hcop
    have hm_dvd_n : m ∣ n := Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd hg_dvd_n
    have h_phi_dvd : m.totient ∣ n.totient := Nat.totient_dvd_of_dvd hm_dvd_n
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h_phi_dvd
    have h_pow_n_mod : (135 ^ n.totient) % m = 1 := by
      calc (135 ^ n.totient) % m
          = (135 ^ (m.totient * k)) % m := by rw [hk]
        _ = ((135 ^ m.totient) ^ k) % m := by rw [pow_mul]
        _ = ((135 ^ m.totient % m) ^ k) % m := by rw [Nat.pow_mod]
        _ = (1 ^ k) % m := by rw [euler]
        _ = 1 % m := by rw [one_pow]
        _ = 1 := Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hm_gt_one
    have h_eq : 135 ^ n.totient = m * (135 ^ n.totient / m) + 1 := by
      have := Nat.div_add_mod (135 ^ n.totient) m
      rw [h_pow_n_mod] at this
      exact this.symm
    refine ⟨135 ^ n.totient / m, ?_⟩
    conv_lhs => rw [h_eq]
    exact Nat.add_sub_cancel _ 1
